name: BreckenridgeHigh School
description: Come play pickleball at BreckenridgeHigh School in Breckenridge, MN! There are 4 indoor wood courts. You’ll have to create your own lines, but portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Breckenridge Pickleball Courts
description: Breckenridge Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Breckenridge, MN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free.
